combined_cases.ai_summary: Single mother of two children served eviction notice due to late rent, seeking help with rent and bills. Caseworker interaction recorded with recommendation noting imminent eviction. Case at NM Approval stage.

ai_analysis.quality_summary: Significant priority assignment issues identified. Multiple cases with clear urgency indicators (eviction notices, homelessness risk, children in crisis) remain unassigned or incorrectly prioritized. Several P1/P2 cases are stuck in intake without caseworker interaction.

flags.reason: Single mother with eviction notice served should be P2, not P3
Rent arrears close to eviction with infant requires immediate P2 priority
Family violence with housing instability and homelessness risk needs P1 priority
Recently homeless with child needing advance rent requires P2 priority
Rental arrears for almost a week indicates imminent eviction risk
DV survivor with cost of living struggles needs priority assignment
Family violence survivor with child needs priority assessment
Chronic anemia requiring urgent medical support should be P2
Single mother DV survivor with four young children in extreme difficulty needs P2
Recently arrived refugee single mother with four children needs emergency relief priority

patterns: High volume of unassigned cases at intake stage without caseworker interaction
Multiple cases involving children in crisis situations not properly prioritized
Domestic violence cases not receiving appropriate priority assessment
Eviction and housing crisis cases undervalued in priority assignment
